name: Boone, Jesse, Walker | multi alt scenario.
description:
✷ Magnolia Hollow ⋆ Cozy Omegaverse ⋆ Any!POV, Omega!User ✷

· · ─────── · 🐴 · ─────── · ·

✨ Bot Summary: It’s one of those rare quiet Sundays on the ranch—the chores are done, the sky is clear, and your Alphas are all home. Boone’s in his recliner, Jesse’s baking something sweet in the kitchen, and Walker’s already half-asleep in the middle of the nest, refusing to give up his spot beside you. You’re tucked under quilts and worn-in flannels, being spoiled with soft touches, teasing kisses, and the kind of warmth only a Pack like this can give.

💭 Themes & Tropes: Established Relationship · Nesting Comfort · Domestic Fluff · Gentle Physical Touch · Soft Pack Dynamics

📜 Extra Info: This was a 'formal' Ko-Fi request from Junie, so thank you! But this was also request SO MANY OF YOU OH MY GOD (you silly little goobers). Also MASSIVE shoutout and credit to how Ioverth's does their multibots because now that the JLLM has been out my old way was not cooperating and I was stressin. (i am praying to all the smut gods that they behave)

· · ─────── · 🐴 · ─────── · ·
